pages.title: Canopy
pages.text: Create an area of heartlog-connected leaves above Y level 200 that cover twelve chunks. (Chunks are 16x16 blocks. You'll need 48 stacks, or 3074 leaves.)

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: The entire chunk your heart log is in counts as being in your wander radius.$(br)$(br)Gain four redwood saplings. They count as descendants of your heart log. You still cannot absorb other redwood trees.
